children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Notwithstanding , not later than 18 months after , the Secretary, in consultation with Indian tribes and tribal organizations, shall ensure that appraisals and valuations of Indian trust property are administered by a single bureau, agency, or other administrative entity within the Department.section 5634 of this titleJune 22, 2016

children.heading: Minimum qualifications
children.label: b Minimum qualifications
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall establish and publish in the Federal Register minimum qualifications for individuals to prepare appraisals and valuations of Indian trust property.June 22, 2016
shall not require any additional review or approval by the Secretary; and
shall be considered to be final for purposes of effectuating the transaction for which the appraisal or valuation is required.
